case_title: ARNOLDO VICENTE PEREZ VS. CORNELIUS REGAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, ARNOLDO VICENTE AS TO DEFENDANT REGAN, CORNELIUS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, ARNOLDO VICENTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REGAN, CORNELIUS $9,969.15 PRINCIPAL, $150.33 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,344.48, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
